source.plaintext_policy: fixture task text only; official encrypted BU Bench task text is imported only into /tmp

commands: uv run bench agent verify browser-use-cli --benchmarks-dir <evidence-root> --json

GEMINI_API_KEY=<redacted> uv run python benchmarks/browser-use-smoke/parity_test.py --agent browser-use-agent --model gemini-3.5-flash --parity-out <evidence-root>/browser-use-agent/parity_experiment.json
uv run bench agent verify browser-use-agent --benchmarks-dir <evidence-root> --json

GEMINI_API_KEY=<redacted> uv run python benchmarks/browser-use-smoke/parity_test.py --agent stagehand-agent --model google/gemini-3.5-flash --parity-out <evidence-root>/stagehand-agent/parity_experiment.json
uv run bench agent verify stagehand-agent --benchmarks-dir <evidence-root> --json

artifacts.raw_trace_policy: raw run_data traces may contain decrypted task text, ground truth, model output, and screenshots; this probe records paths/counts only

parity.blocked_reason: original runner did not produce an agent trace

commands: GEMINI_API_KEY=<redacted> uv run --extra judge bench eval create --tasks-dir <tmp>/tasks --agent browser-use-agent --model gemini-2.5-flash --sandbox docker --jobs-dir <tmp>/jobs --concurrency 1 --agent-idle-timeout 900

GEMINI_API_KEY=<redacted> uv run python benchmarks/browser-use-smoke/official_adoption_driver.py --upstream-repo <tmp>/benchmark --work-dir <tmp>/work --task-indices 0 --agent browser-use-agent --model gemini-2.5-flash --sandbox docker --original-runner-timeout-sec 5 --original-task-timeout-sec 5 --parity-out <tmp>/browser-use-official/parity_experiment.json --overwrite
additional_evidence.summary: One official encrypted BU Bench task imported into /tmp ran through the repeatable adoption driver with browser-use-agent, Docker, Gemini, and llm-judge. The latest dogfood completed with reward 0.0 because StackExchange was behind Cloudflare verification, while the bounded original runner probe timed out before producing an agent trace. This is structured blocked-runner/completed-BenchFlow evidence, not original-vs-BenchFlow parity.

commands: GEMINI_API_KEY=<redacted> uv run python benchmarks/stagehand-smoke/parity_test.py --stagehand-repo /tmp/stagehand-fresh.OuHQN2 --task agent/sign_in --model google/gemini-3.5-flash --parity-out /tmp/benchflow-stagehand-parity.aJhbsC/stagehand-smoke/parity_experiment.json --keep-work-dir

uv run bench agent verify stagehand-smoke --benchmarks-dir /tmp/benchflow-stagehand-parity.aJhbsC --require-adoption-report --loop-report-out /tmp/benchflow-stagehand-parity.aJhbsC/stagehand-smoke/loop-report.json --json
additional_evidence.summary: Official Stagehand eval task agent/sign_in has same-task original-vs-BenchFlow parity through the repeatable driver: original score 1.0 and final URL https://v0-modern-login-flow.vercel.app/authorized; BenchFlow reward 1.0, same final URL, trace/artifact/timing evidence, and strict adoption-loop scale-ready.

commands: GEMINI_API_KEY=<redacted> uv run python benchmarks/stagehand-smoke/parity_test.py --stagehand-repo /tmp/stagehand-fresh.OuHQN2 --task agent/steam_games --model google/gemini-3.5-flash --parity-out /tmp/benchflow-stagehand-steam-parity.iRJx1g/stagehand-smoke/parity_experiment.json --keep-work-dir

uv run bench agent verify stagehand-smoke --benchmarks-dir /tmp/benchflow-stagehand-steam-parity.iRJx1g --require-adoption-report --loop-report-out /tmp/benchflow-stagehand-steam-parity.iRJx1g/stagehand-smoke/loop-report.json --json
additional_evidence.summary: Official Stagehand eval task agent/steam_games passes original-vs-BenchFlow parity under the URL-contains success contract: both runners scored 1.0 and satisfied https://store.steampowered.com/, while retaining raw final URLs, trace/artifact/timing evidence, and zero Docker leaks.

The Stagehand importer now inventories all official bench tasks and reports provider-honest unsupported reasons. Current conservative support is deterministic URL-check agent tasks only; Stagehand verifier/expected-answer mappings remain explicit unsupported work.

gaps: browser runtime is still mostly agent-owned; first-class browser environment adapter remains to land
broader Stagehand parity still needs coverage beyond the two verified official deterministic URL-check tasks and a mapped verifier/expected-answer reward contract
broader BU Bench parity requires more selected tasks and a stable original runner path
